summary: Iter 88 audit batch 4 (5 tightly-scoped fixes) — ALL PASS. Backend pytest 7/7 in /app/backend/tests/test_iter88_audit_batch4.py: (1) GET /api/character-templates?ruleset_id=dnd5e_2024 → 12 templates, all with version=1, source='core', ruleset_id='dnd5e_2024'. (2) dnd5e_2014 → 12 templates similarly tagged. (3) GET /api/character-templates (no filter) → 24 total. (4) GET /api/character-templates/tmpl-thorne-fighter → full doc (Fighter/2014/version=1/active=true), no _id leaked. (5) POST /api/character-templates/ai-match description='I want to play a tank' ruleset_id='dnd5e_2014' → best_match.id starts with 'tmpl-'. (6) GET /api/characters/{wizard}/level-up-options?target_level=2 → new preflight fields present: subclass_options (non-empty), feat_options=[] (L2 not ASI), spells_to_learn=2 (Wizard L1→L2 = 8-6), cantrips_to_learn=0, can_choose_subclass=true, subclass_unlock_level=2, edition='2014'. (7) target_level=4 correctly rejected with 400 'Target level must be 2' guard. Feat list for L4-ASI was verified via direct class_progression import: feats_for_edition('2014','general')=45 and ('2024','general')=45 — both >30. Frontend Playwright: (a) /campaign/b51ba0e9...: data-testid='campaign-settings-btn' is GONE; GM Tools sidebar has new 'Uploads' tab; clicking it renders UploadTab with 'Campaign Uploads' heading + 5 upload cards (Campaign Maps, Character Portraits, Documents & PDFs, Audio & Music, Other Files) each with 'Click to Upload' CTA. (b) /characters/new → 'Premade Characters' → all 12 templates load from DB-backed /api/character-templates (Thorne, Elara, Shade, Bromm, Kara, Lysander, Fenn, Selene, Rook, Vex, Ember, Shen all visible). (c) Regression: /home has character-search-input + campaign-search-input; /admin has all 4 admin-stat-* testids.

passed: test_wizard_l1_to_l2_preflight — all 7 new fields present with correct values
test_wizard_l3_to_l4_is_asi_with_feats — 400 guard correct; feat list length verified via direct import = 45 feats (>30)
Clicking Uploads renders UploadTab: 'Campaign Uploads' heading + 5 upload cards visible
/characters/new → Premade Characters: all 12 templates load from DB endpoint (Thorne...Shen)

issues: Purple gradient theme on upload cards is inconsistent with the campaign's gold/amber theme. Per review-request note this is PRE-EXISTING and out-of-scope for Iter 88; flagged for future theme cleanup batch.

critical_code_review_comments: backend/routes/character_templates.py seed_templates_if_empty (line 242-257) — the version-bump branch does a full $set of the seed fields, which would overwrite any DB-only content-ops edits made by admins. Consider using $setOnInsert semantics (or only updating fields that are genuinely content-owned like 'version', 'pitch', 'ability_scores') to preserve admin edits. Not a bug today (collection is seed-owned), but will matter when content-ops starts editing in DB.

backend/routes/characters.py level-up-options (line 510-581) — imports `_SPELLS_KNOWN_PROGRESSION` and `_CANTRIPS_KNOWN_PROGRESSION` from data.class_progression using private underscore-prefixed names. Prefer exposing public `spells_known_table()` / `cantrips_known_table()` helpers to avoid coupling the route to internal naming.

backend/data/class_progression.py line 34 — `Warlock` progression table starts at level 1 with 2 known spells, which is correct for 2014 Pact Magic; verify 2024 rules use the same table or add a 2024-specific variant if different (2024 Warlock went to 'prepared' casting for some spells — may need a future split).

frontend/components/CampaignDashboard.js line 23 — UploadTab import uses '@/components/gm/UploadTab' alias. Confirm CRA/Webpack alias config still resolves this; mixed with relative imports elsewhere in the file can be inconsistent (most other imports in this file use relative './gm/X' style). Minor nit: pick one convention.

frontend/components/LevelUpWizard.js — preflight now drives spellGain/cantripGain/hasSubclassChoice. Good. Recommend adding a loading-state guard (skeleton) while preflight is in-flight so the wizard doesn't briefly render with local-fallback values then flicker to server values.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 88 fully passing. Backend seed is idempotent — safe to restart. Feat count for both 2014 and 2024 is 45 (>30 threshold). Wizard-subclass unlock level in 2014 is 2 (not 3) per rules config — confirmed via subclass_unlock_level field. The UploadTab purple theme mismatch with the rest of CampaignDashboard (gold/amber) is tracked by main agent for a separate theme-cleanup sprint — do NOT file as a bug. LevelUpWizard live L4 ASI/feat testing requires a Wizard at L3 — test char is L1 so we validated via API guard + direct class_progression import instead; if future iter seeds a L3 char, add an e2e LevelUpWizard test that clicks Open Level Up and asserts feat dropdown count > 30.
